Episteme 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.episteme.social.economics
  2. Property

Uses of Interface
org.episteme.social.economics.Property

Packages that use Property
Package
Description
org.episteme.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.
org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic
Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis.
org.episteme.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.episteme.social.arts.music
- musical notes, instruments, compositions.
org.episteme.social.arts.theater
- plays, performances, dramatic arts.
org.episteme.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.episteme.social.economics.money
Provides classes for monetary and financial operations.
org.episteme.social.economics.resources
Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
org.episteme.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.episteme.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.
org.episteme.social.law
Provides the org.episteme.social.law module.
org.episteme.social.politics
Provides the org.episteme.social.politics module.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.architecture

    Classes in org.episteme.social.architecture that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Building
    Represents a building or architectural structure, integrating historical, geographical, and stylistic dimensions.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic

    Classes in org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Vehicle
    Represents a generic vehicle entity within a macro or microscopic traffic system.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.arts

    Classes in org.episteme.social.arts that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Artwork
    Represents a piece of art (Artwork), integrating historical, geographical, economic, and scientific dimensions.
    class 
    Book
    Represents a book or publication within the literary arts.
    class 
    Film
    Represents a film or motion picture within the cinematic arts.
    class 
    Picture
    Represents a visual artwork such as a painting, drawing, or photograph.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.arts.music

    Classes in org.episteme.social.arts.music that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Composition
    Represents a musical composition with multiple tracks and signatures.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.arts.theater

    Classes in org.episteme.social.arts.theater that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Choreography
    Represents the choreography for a show.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.economics

    Classes in org.episteme.social.economics that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Bank
    Represents a banking institution capable of managing accounts and providing currency conversion services.
    class 
    Factory
    An organization specialized in mass production and transformation of resources.
    class 
    Holding
    An organization that owns and controls multiple other companies (organizations).
    class 
    HumanResource
    Models human labor and expertise as an economic resource. * @version 1.1
    class 
    MaterialResource
    Represents a physical or tangible resource with a unique identification (serial number).
    class 
    Organization
    Represents a formal social and economic entity (Company, NGO, Government).

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.economics.money

    Classes in org.episteme.social.economics.money that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Account
    Represents a bank account for storing money and financial assets.
    final class 
    Share
    Represents a share (stock) in a company.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.economics.resources

    Classes in org.episteme.social.economics.resources that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Artifact
    Represents a resource created by human craftsmanship (an artifact).
    class 
    Building
    Represents a human-made physical structure such as a house, factory, or skyscraper. * @version 1.1
    class 
    Clothes
    Represents wearable items. * @version 1.1
    class 
    Installation
    Represents a large-scale structure or artwork installed in a specific location.
    class 
    Machine
    Represents a complex tool (machine) that consumes energy to perform work.
    class 
    PhysicalObject
    Represents a crafted object that can be moved and used (e.g., tools, appliances, small structures).
    class 
    Road
    Represents a constructed path or road infrastructure.
    class 
    Robot
    Represents an autonomous machine (Robot).
    class 
    Tool
    Represents a tool used to build or repair other objects.
    class 
    Vehicle
    Represents a machine capable of transporting entities.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.geography

    Classes in org.episteme.social.geography that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BusinessPlace
    Represents a business location, office, or industrial site.
    class 
    Home
    Represents a residence, a specific place where individuals live.
    class 
    OwnedPlace
    Represents a piece of land or building that is owned by one or more economic agents.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.history.archeology

    Classes in org.episteme.social.history.archeology that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Item
    Represents an archaeological item (fossil, artifact, etc.) found at a site.

  • Uses of Property in org.episteme.social.law

    Classes in org.episteme.social.law that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    License
    Represents an official license or certificate issued by an authority that grants specific rights to an owner.

    Classes in org.episteme.social.politics that implement Property
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Administration
    Represents a state-managed administrative organization (agency, ministry, police, etc.).
    class 
    PoliticalParty
    Represents a political party organized for democratic participation and governance.
